title: Fix sum() for negative numbers
prompt:
There is a bug in src/sum.ts. The sum() function returns 0 whenever either argument is negative — it should return the actual sum (a + b) for ALL real numbers, including negatives.

Fix the bug in src/sum.ts. The failing tests in tests/target.test.ts must pass after your fix. The tests in tests/regression.test.ts must continue to pass — do not break them.

Do not modify the tests. Do not add new files. Keep the change minimal.
